settings.heading: Jon Boat Rentals
settings.body_text: Get out on the water with our fleet of well-maintained aluminum jon boats. All safety equipment included.

settings.label: The Fleet
settings.heading: 14–15' Aluminum Jon Boats
settings.body_text:
Each boat is equipped with a 15 or 20 hp Yamaha outboard and all USCG-required safety equipment. Perfect for exploring the tidal creeks of Litchfield, Pawleys Island, and DeBordieu.

Whether you're fishing the flats, scouting for redfish, or just cruising the marsh, our boats are ready to go.

settings.label: Pricing
settings.heading: Rental Rates
settings.body_text: Reservations are recommended. Each additional day beyond your rental period is $100.
settings.footnote: Prices subject to change. Completion of contract with refundable deposit and rental payment due at time of possession. Reservations are recommended.

settings.title: 1 Day
settings.description:
Renter must pick up boat
Completion of contract required
Refundable deposit due at pickup
All safety equipment included

settings.title: 3 Days
settings.description:
Delivery available (3-day minimum)
Customers welcome to pick up & trailer
Completion of contract required
Refundable deposit due at pickup

settings.title: 5 Days
settings.description:
Delivery available
Customers welcome to pick up & trailer
Completion of contract required
Refundable deposit due at pickup

settings.label: Ready to Book?
settings.heading: Give Us a Call or Stop By
settings.body_text: We'll get you set up with a boat, a map of the local creeks, and some tips on where the fish are biting.
